summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: general 2×2 product formula derivation. PINK M_2=[[a, b], [c, d]], YELLOW M_1=[[e, f], [g, h]]. ValueTracker idx_tr reveals entries (ae+bg), (af+bh), (ce+dg), (cf+dh) one at a time with always_redraw rectangle highlights on corresponding M_2 row and M_1 column. Dynamic explanation text mapping each cell to 'row·col' and 'where î/ĵ lands'.
